sessionStart.command: cat >/dev/null; export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:$PATH"; { APP="${CURSOR_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/sr-search"; PY=$(uv python find --project "$APP" --no-config) && PYTHONPATH="$APP/src" "$PY" -m stockroom shim rectify --owner cursor --app-dir "$APP"; stockroom dashboard; } >/dev/null || true
